title: Finn's Giggling Ghost Friend
synopsis: When Finn meets a playful ghost named Boo in his attic, they become unlikely friends who love to play pranks and have silly adventures together, learning that friendship comes in all shapes and sizes.

pages.text: Finn heard a funny noise upstairs. THUMP! BUMP! GIGGLE! "What could that be?" he wondered. His mom was making dinner. His dad was reading the newspaper. The noise was coming from the attic!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes standing at the bottom of stairs, eyes wide with curiosity, head tilted dramatically upward toward ceiling, one hand cupped to his ear in exaggerated listening pose
illustration.alt: Finn listening to mysterious sounds from upstairs

pages.text: Finn climbed the creaky stairs. CREAK! CREAK! CREAK! Each step made him more excited. He loved mysteries! When he reached the attic door, he heard another sound. "Hee hee hee!" Someone was laughing up there!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes tiptoeing up wooden stairs, body stretched forward comically, arms windmilling for balance, eyes bulging with excitement and anticipation
illustration.alt: Finn sneaking up the creaky attic stairs

pages.text: Finn opened the attic door slowly. SQUEAK! Inside, he saw boxes flying around in circles! A white, fluffy shape was juggling old tennis balls. "Hello!" said the shape. "I'm Boo! Want to play?"

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes peeking through doorway with jaw dropped comically to the floor, eyes popping out like springs, while a friendly white ghost juggles tennis balls with boxes floating in mid-air
illustration.alt: Finn discovering Boo the ghost juggling in the attic

pages.text: "You're a ghost!" Finn gasped. "A real ghost!" Boo giggled and did a backflip in the air. "I'm a FRIENDLY ghost! I've been so lonely up here. Will you be my friend?" Finn's surprise turned into a big smile.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes with arms stretched wide in amazement, mouth forming a perfect 'O' of surprise, while Boo the ghost performs an impossible spiral backflip with motion lines showing the acrobatic movement
illustration.alt: Finn amazed as Boo does acrobatic tricks in the air

pages.text: "I love to play pranks!" Boo said. "Watch this!" Boo made all the dust bunnies dance like tiny ballerinas. Finn clapped and laughed. "That's amazing! Can you teach me ghost tricks?"

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes clapping enthusiastically with hands blurred from rapid motion, face scrunched up with delighted laughter, while tiny dust bunnies wearing tutus dance on their hind legs around the attic
illustration.alt: Finn laughing as dust bunnies dance like ballerinas

pages.text: Boo and Finn played hide-and-seek. Boo could turn invisible! Finn looked everywhere. "Where are you, Boo?" Suddenly, his shoelaces tied themselves together. TRIP! Down went Finn! "Found you!" giggled Boo.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes tumbling forward with arms pinwheeling wildly, legs tangled in knotted shoelaces, face showing surprise mixed with laughter, while Boo materializes nearby looking mischievous
illustration.alt: Finn tripping over his mysteriously tied shoelaces

pages.text: "Let's have a pillow fight!" said Finn. Boo made all the old pillows float in the air. WHAP! BONK! POOF! Feathers flew everywhere like snow. Finn swung his pillow at the floating ones.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes wielding a pillow like a sword, body twisted in dynamic action pose, surrounded by floating pillows and clouds of feathers swirling through the air like a tornado
illustration.alt: Finn in an epic pillow fight with floating pillows and feathers everywhere

pages.text: The pillow fight was so fun! Feathers stuck to Finn's hair. He looked like a funny bird! Boo laughed so hard he turned bright pink instead of white. "You're the silliest friend ever!" Boo said.

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair covered in white feathers, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes crossed as he looks up at feathers on his head, arms spread like wings in a goofy bird pose, while pink-tinted Boo doubles over with exaggerated belly laughs
illustration.alt: Finn covered in feathers looking like a silly bird while Boo laughs

pages.text: "I have to go eat dinner now," Finn said. "But can we play again tomorrow?" Boo's glow got brighter with happiness. "Really? You want to come back?" "Of course!" said Finn. "You're my best ghost friend!"

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes giving an enthusiastic thumbs up with a huge grin, while Boo glows so brightly with joy that he's practically a tiny sun, radiating happiness beams in all directions
illustration.alt: Finn and Boo both glowing with happiness about their new friendship

pages.text: From that day on, Finn visited Boo every afternoon. They played games, told jokes, and had the best adventures. Finn learned that the very best friends can be the most surprising ones of all!

illustration.description: Finn with messy sandy-blonde hair, pale skin with freckles, blue-green eyes and Boo sitting together on an old trunk sharing a comic book, both with exaggerated happy expressions, surrounded by their favorite toys and games scattered around the cozy attic
illustration.alt: Finn and Boo enjoying a quiet moment together as best friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: exaggerated cartoon, squash and stretch, oversized expressions, candy bright colors, bouncy dynamic, comedic poses, slapstick energy, rubber hose animation feel

questions.question: Where did Finn first hear the mysterious sounds?
questions.explanation: Finn heard the funny noises coming from the attic upstairs.

questions.question: What was Boo doing when Finn first saw him?
questions.explanation: Boo was juggling old tennis balls and making boxes fly around in circles.

questions.question: How did Boo play a prank on Finn during hide-and-seek?
questions.explanation: Boo made Finn's shoelaces tie themselves together, causing him to trip.

questions.question: What happened to Boo when he laughed really hard?
questions.explanation: Boo laughed so hard he turned bright pink instead of his usual white color.

questions.question: When does Finn visit Boo?
questions.explanation: The story says that from that day on, Finn visited Boo every afternoon to play.
